'''vogafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kecklish|kecklish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kecklish|kecklish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vogafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogafithi|vogafithi]] || [[word:vogafiji|vogafiji]] || [[word:vogafishi|vogafishi]] || [[word:vogafiki|vogafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogafuthuthu|vogafuthuthu]] || [[word:vogafujuju|vogafujuju]] || [[word:vogafushushu|vogafushushu]] || [[word:vogafukuku|vogafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogafuthu|vogafuthu]] || [[word:vogafuju|vogafuju]] || [[word:vogafushu|vogafushu]] || [[word:vogafuku|vogafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogafufthuf|vogafufthuf]] || [[word:vogafufjuf|vogafufjuf]] || [[word:vogafufshuf|vogafufshuf]] || [[word:vogafufkuf|vogafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogafethe|vogafethe]] || [[word:vogafeje|vogafeje]] || [[word:vogafeshe|vogafeshe]] || [[word:vogafeke|vogafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogafothotho|vogafothotho]] || [[word:vogafojojo|vogafojojo]] || [[word:vogafoshosho|vogafoshosho]] || [[word:vogafokoko|vogafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogafotho|vogafotho]] || [[word:vogafojo|vogafojo]] || [[word:vogafosho|vogafosho]] || [[word:vogafoko|vogafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogafofthof|vogafofthof]] || [[word:vogafofjof|vogafofjof]] || [[word:vogafofshof|vogafofshof]] || [[word:vogafofkof|vogafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfthÃŸf|vogafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfjÃŸf|vogafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfshÃŸf|vogafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfkÃŸf|vogafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vogafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vogafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vogafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vogafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfthÃŸf|vogafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfjÃŸf|vogafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfshÃŸf|vogafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfkÃŸf|vogafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfthÃŸf|vogafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfjÃŸf|vogafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfshÃŸf|vogafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vogafÃŸfkÃŸf|vogafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vogafÃḊthÃḊ|vogafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vogafÃḊjÃḊ|vogafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vogafÃḊshÃḊ|vogafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vogafÃḊkÃḊ|vogafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vogafathatha|vogafathatha]] || [[word:vogafajaja|vogafajaja]] || [[word:vogafashasha|vogafashasha]] || [[word:vogafakaka|vogafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vogafatha|vogafatha]] || [[word:vogafaja|vogafaja]] || [[word:vogafasha|vogafasha]] || [[word:vogafaka|vogafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vogafafthaf|vogafafthaf]] || [[word:vogafafjaf|vogafafjaf]] || [[word:vogafafshaf|vogafafshaf]] || [[word:vogafafkaf|vogafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vogafasha|vogafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogafshÃḋsha|vogafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogafrosha|vogafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogafmusha|vogafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogafyasha|vogafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogafnkshÃḋsha|govogafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogafnkrosha|govogafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogafnkmusha|govogafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogafnkyasha|govogafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vogagafasha|vogagafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogagafshÃḋsha|vogagafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogagafrosha|vogagafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogagafmusha|vogagafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogagafyasha|vogagafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogagafnkshÃḋsha|govogagafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogagafnkrosha|govogagafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogagafnkmusha|govogagafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogagafnkyasha|govogagafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vegÃḊfasha|vegÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vegÃḊfshÃḋsha|vegÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vegÃḊfrosha|vegÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vegÃḊfmusha|vegÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vegÃḊfyasha|vegÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govegÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|govegÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govegÃḊfnkrosha|govegÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govegÃḊfnkmusha|govegÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govegÃḊfnkyasha|govegÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vogfafasha|vogfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vogfafshÃḋsha|vogfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vogfafrosha|vogfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vogfafmusha|vogfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vogfafyasha|vogfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govogfafnkshÃḋsha|govogfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govogfafnkrosha|govogfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govogfafnkmusha|govogfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govogfafnkyasha|govogfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
